items.title: Ideas Have Genomes: Benchmarking Scientific Lineage Reasoning and Lineage-Grounded Idea Generation
items.chinese_summary: 本论文介绍 IdeaGene-Bench 基准测试，用于评估 AI 系统追踪科学思想传承关系的能力。通过构建 Idea Genome 框架，记录思想的继承、变异、丢失等演化动态，该基准包含 1,961 个黄金传承轨迹，支持推理测试和思想生成评估。实验表明现有系统在谱系推理上存在组合瓶颈，最强系统仅达到 27.3% 的精确准确率。
items.abstract: Scientific ideas rarely start from a blank page. They inherit mechanisms, repair known limitations, and recombine pieces of earlier work, much like biological genomes. Current benchmarks still say little about whether AI systems can follow this inheritance structure. We present IdeaGene-Bench (IG-Bench), a benchmark for scientific lineage reasoning and lineage-grounded idea generation.

items.title: Using AI-based Learning Assistants in Higher Education: A Large-Scale Descriptive Analysis
items.chinese_summary: 本研究对高等教育中 AI 学习助手的使用进行大规模描述性分析，基于 77,543 名远程教育学生的客观日志数据，考察不同性别、年龄组、学习集群、学位和学习模式下的使用模式差异。研究发现 Syntea 助手已嵌入许多学生的学习日常，但使用情况在不同人口统计学和结构背景下存在显著差异。
items.abstract: In this study, we present a large-scale descriptive analysis of the use of an AI-based learning assistant (Syntea) in higher education. Based on objective log data from 77,543 students enrolled in distance studies, we examine usage patterns across gender, age group, study cluster, degree, and study mode.

items.title: AUTOPILOT VQA: Benchmarking Vision-Language Models for Incident-Centric Dashcam Understanding
items.chinese_summary: 本论文提出 AUTOPILOT-VQA 基准测试，专门用于评估视觉语言模型对行车记录仪视频的事件中心型理解能力。该基准覆盖天气光照、交通环境、道路布局、路面状况、标识、涉及实体、事故发生、影响位置和可避免性推理等多个安全相关类别，推动自动驾驶系统的可解释性、鲁棒性和安全意识发展。
items.abstract: Recent advances in Vision-Language Models, Large Language Models, and Multimodal Large Language Models have improved autonomous driving tasks such as scene understanding, decision making, trajectory prediction, and visual question answering. However, evaluating whether these models can reliably reason about safety-critical incidents remains challenging.

items.title: Workflow as Knowledge: Semantic Persistence for LLM-Mediated Workflows
items.chinese_summary: 本论文提出受 Lisp 启发的语言无关概念模型，将工作流定义、实例、推理记录、上下文快照和依赖关系表示为持久知识对象。核心语义区分推导（确定性计算）和推理（LLM 介导的判断），使工作流本身成为可检查、可恢复和可审查的知识对象。
items.abstract: Large language model (LLM) applications increasingly use explicit workflows for tool use, retrieval, branching, checkpointing, and human approval. Existing workflow systems already address many execution concerns. This paper proposes a Lisp-inspired but language-independent conceptual model.

items.title: The Illusion of Equivalency: Statistical Characterization of Quantization Effects in LLMs
items.chinese_summary: 本论文研究表明，训练后量化在保持准确率和困惑度指标的同时，可能导致 LLM 行为显著变化。引入一致性一致度量，发现在中等量化程度下行为差异已经出现。通过分析注意力权重的结构操作，揭示 Query 和 Key 投影比 Value 和 Output 投影更敏感，打破了基础模型与量化模型等价的错觉。
items.abstract: Post-training quantization is widely used to deploy large language models in resource-constrained settings, yet its evaluation relies almost exclusively on accuracy and perplexity. We show that these metrics fail to capture behavioral changes induced by quantization.

items.title: Remember When It Matters: Proactive Memory Agent for Long-Horizon Agents
items.chinese_summary: 本论文针对长周期任务中的行为状态衰减问题，提出主动记忆代理机制，独立于执行代理运行，从轨迹更新结构化记忆库并决定是否注入提醒。在 Terminal-Bench 2.0 和 τ²-Bench 上测试，该机制分别将 pass@1 提升 8.3 和 6.8 个百分点，选择性干预优于被动暴露和持续注入等方法。
items.abstract: In long-horizon tasks, decision-relevant state is often scattered across an expanding trajectory, while the action agent must surface it and act. As trajectories grow, task requirements, environment facts, prior attempts, diagnoses, and open subgoals can be buried in the context window or pushed beyond it.

items.title: SolarChain-Eval: A Physics-Constrained Benchmark for Trustworthy Economic Agents in Decentralized Energy Markets
items.chinese_summary: 本论文提出 SolarChain-Eval 基准，用于评估去中心化能源市场中可信赖的经济代理。该基准将市场治理建模为兼容 Gymnasium 的马尔可夫决策过程，从市场效用、物理安全、滑点、动作平滑性、空间公平性和可审计性多个维度评估策略，并集成基于 LLM 的规划/审计层。
items.abstract: As agentic AI systems are increasingly applied to cyber-physical environments, their evaluation requires assessment of both task performance and trustworthiness. In decentralized energy markets, autonomous agents may improve market utility, but may also exploit invalid physical data.

items.title: Formal Mechanisms for Market Stability in Self-Interested Agent Societies: A Marketplace Simulation Study
items.chinese_summary: 本论文研究多代理社会中维持市场稳定的形式化机制。通过 18 个 DeepSeek-V3 代理的市场模拟，比较八种机制在渐进式 troll 注入下的表现，发现调解机制表现最佳。对抗性红队测试表明，最佳攻击仅降低诚实代理效用 13.3% 但无法使市场崩溃，调解机制在持续对抗压力下仍能恢复。
items.abstract: Self-interested agents, left unconstrained, tend toward defection in repeated social dilemmas, causing cooperative gains from trade to collapse. This paper investigates what formal mechanisms, layered on top of unrestricted communication, are sufficient for a society of such agents to maintain market stability.

items.title: The complexities of patient-centred conversational artificial intelligence
items.chinese_summary: 本论文分析 2,053 个真实患者聊天记录，发现用户间沟通模式和情感表达差异巨大。开发的患者模拟器分别建模临床内容、情感状态、对话策略和沟通风格，图灵测试显示模拟对话与真实对话几乎无法区分（人类评分准确率 55%）。在紧急评估中，沟通风格显著影响分诊结果。
items.abstract: Consumer-facing health chatbots powered by large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for symptom assessment. However, chatbot development and evaluation often rely on cooperative, articulate, simulated patients. We analysed 2,053 real patient-chatbot conversations.

items.title: Towards Precision Therapy in Hepatocellular Carcinoma: A Clinical-Reasoning LLM for Risk Stratification and Treatment Guidance
items.chinese_summary: 本论文介绍 HCC-STAR 系统，用于肝细胞癌的风险分层和精确治疗指导。基于约 30,000 个 SEER 病例和临床验证的提示增强工作流程，开发知识对齐推理框架。在 12 家医院 6,668 名患者的多中心队列中，该系统在治疗推荐和风险分层方面优于临床指南和竞争模型（包括 GPT-5 和 Gemini-2.5 Pro）。
items.abstract: Hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) is a common malignancy and a leading cause of cancer-related mortality. Current guidelines and staging systems provide coarse categories, but often miss within-stage heterogeneity and the clinical context in electronic medical records.

items.title: SHAP-Weighted Cross-Modal Expert Fusion for Emotion and Sentiment Recognition: Evidence and Limits
items.chinese_summary: 本论文重新审视基于 XAI 的自适应融合方法，研究 SHAP 归因减少在专家特征维度不等时的效果。在 MELD 7 类情感识别中，sum-abs XGAF 与早期融合性能接近（0.5983 vs 0.6018），在 CMU-MOSEI 3 类情感识别中略优于早期融合（0.6519 vs 0.6485）。主要增益来自添加跨模态专家，特别是三模态专家。
items.abstract: Multimodal emotion and sentiment recognition is commonly addressed by early fusion, which concatenates modalities before classification, or late fusion, which combines independently trained unimodal predictors.

items.title: CommuniWave:A Machine Learning Model for Quantifying the Degree of Temporary Informal Behavior in Urban Communities
items.chinese_summary: 本论文提出 CommuniWave 机器学习模型，用于检测和量化城市社区中的临时非正式行为程度。模型集成基于 mmaction2 的行为捕获网络、自研 YOLOv10 模型和随机森林行为评估模型，通过街景视频生成 DIB 波动图表，支持动态监测和精细化决策。
items.abstract: For urban managers and designers, improving the functional attributes of urban communities to enhance territorial resilience in the face of complexity and uncertainty is crucial. Currently, community planning often follows a top-down approach.

items.title: AI-guided stimuli discovery and generation to optimize facial emotion perception studies in autism
items.chinese_summary: 本论文表明，自闭症与神经典型成年人的情感判断差异集中在小部分诊断性面部表情，而非均匀分布。训练群体特异性人工神经网络模型预测图像级判断，用于选择和生成最大化/最小化群体差异的新面部刺激，建立模型引导的刺激发现和转化框架。
items.abstract: Understanding perceptual differences between autistic and neurotypical adults requires behavioral assays that are sensitive, reliable, and mechanistically informative. Facial emotion perception is a useful test case because group differences have been reported.

items.title: Drift-Aware Temporal Graph Rewiring (DATGR) for Adaptive Semantic Modeling in Biomedical Text
items.chinese_summary: 本论文提出 DATGR 框架，通过基于估计语义漂移的动态更新共现边来建模概念演化。不同于为每个时间切片重新训练嵌入，DATGR 使用逻辑更新规则进行轻量级、反馈驱动的重新连接。在 BIOMRC 上评估，该方法比静态基线实现约 0.066 的 AUROC 绝对提升。
items.abstract: Biomedical language evolves rapidly as new discoveries emerge, causing traditional text models to lose semantic fidelity over time. Static embeddings and co-occurrence graphs cannot capture such evolution.

items.title: Applying JEPA-Style Predictive Learning to JA4-Derived Network Fingerprints
items.chinese_summary: 本论文探索将 JEPA 风格预测学习应用于网络指纹识别。构建 JA4-JEPA 基于 Transformer 的模型，训练于 JA4DB 和 CIC-IDS-2017 数据集的 JA4 子字段，在协议族分类上实现 0.9899 余弦相似度和 0.9220 kNN 准确率，表明该方法可为网络指纹生成有用的嵌入表示。
items.abstract: I-JEPA and V-JEPA learn by matching latent predictions to target encoder outputs rather than regenerating the original input, and this has worked well for images and video. We explore whether the same objective works for compact network fingerprints.

items.title: OmniFood-Bench: Evaluating VLMs for Nutrient Reasoning and Personalized Health Advice
items.chinese_summary: 本论文介绍 OmniFood-Bench 基准测试，从三个渐进能力评估视觉语言模型：基础感知、定量推理、安全关键建议。评估 6 个最先进 VLM 揭示惊人的「语义-物理鸿沟」：模型在命名菜品上达到接近人类准确率，但在质量估算上灾难性失败，常为高风险糖尿病档案产生幻觉式良性建议。
items.abstract: The rapid integration of Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) into critical infrastructure promises to revolutionize personalized healthcare and dietary management. However, in the domain of food systems, autonomous agents face a unique and persistent challenge.

items.title: Game Theory Driven Multi-Agent Framework Mitigates Language Model Hallucination
items.chinese_summary: 本论文提出 G-Frame 自适应多代理框架，集成贝叶斯和团队博弈原理，建立高质量数据合成和模型训练的自动闭环。合成 363,045 条思维链和 199,589 问答对，训练的 7B 模型 OmniChem 在化学基准上达到与 GPT 4o mini 相当性能，幻觉相对基础架构减少 79.46%。
items.abstract: The application of lightweight Large Language Models in rule-based scientific domains remains severely limited by their tendency to mimic linguistic patterns rather than reproduce axiomatic reasoning, causing frequent hallucinations.

items.title: Towards Mechanistically Understanding Why Memorized Knowledge Fails to Generalize in Large Language Model Finetuning
items.chinese_summary: 本论文形式化「知道-使用鸿沟」现象：LLM 可快速记忆新事实但无法用于下游推理任务，表现为准确率差距和记忆与泛化之间的时间滞后。通过自修补干预技术识别内部激活位置，发现记忆表示可能存在但未路由到计算有效层，简单启发式策略可恢复 58-75% 的泛化失败改进空间。
items.abstract: Fine-tuning LLMs to inject new knowledge faces a critical challenge: LLMs can quickly memorize new facts, yet fail to use them for downstream reasoning tasks. We formalize this failure as the Knowing--Using Gap.

items.title: FedOPAL: One-Shot Federated Learning via Analytic Visual Prompt Tuning
items.chinese_summary: 本论文提出 FedOPAL 框架，通过分析视觉提示作为特征校正器，主动将异构数据的特征分布校正为线性可分空间，满足分析联邦学习的理论假设。实验表明该方法不仅显著优于原始分析方法，还在保持零服务器端训练成本的同时，达到与最先进迭代方法相当的准确率。
items.abstract: With the widespread deployment of basic models in edge intelligence, communication bandwidth has become a core bottleneck restricting the scalability of federated learning. Although one-shot federated learning alleviates this problem.

items.title: MobiDiff: Semantic-Aware Multi-Channel Discrete Diffusion for Human Mobility Data Generation
items.chinese_summary: 本论文介绍 MobiDiff 端到端离散扩散框架，通过直接去噪多通道语义骨架生成移动性数据，避免现有方法中昂贵的插值、潜在轨迹构建和从粗到精的实现流程。在亚特兰大、波士顿和西雅图三个大规模真实数据集上评估，该方法有效保留轨迹长度和时间间隔分布，推理速度比 GeoGen 平均快 5.3 倍。
items.abstract: Human mobility data are essential for transportation optimization, urban planning, and resource allocation, yet real-world mobility data are costly to collect and difficult to share due to privacy concerns.
